# Sweet Delights | Artisanal Pastry Shop

A premium, modern web presence for a bakery/patisserie, showcasing artisanal products and providing contact information.

## Technical Architecture
- **Framework**: Astro 5 (Static Site Generation / Hybrid)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4 (using `@theme` variables for brand colors)
- **Typography**: Playfair Display (Serif/Headers), Inter (Sans-serif/Body)
- **Primary Colors**: 
  - Brand Primary: `#5c4033` (Deep Brown)
  - Brand Secondary: `#d4a373` (Tan)
  - Brand Accent: `#faedcd` (Cream)

## Key File Locations
- **Home**: `src/pages/index.astro` (Hero, highlights, contact)
- **Menu**: `src/pages/menu.astro` (Interactive magazine-style menu with cursor previews)
- **About**: `src/pages/about.astro` (Brand story and "Artisanal Code")
- **Error Page**: `src/pages/404.astro` (Custom styled 404)
- **Layout**: `src/layouts/Layout.astro` (HTML wrapper, font imports, view transitions)
- **Content**: `src/content/menu/` (Markdown files for each menu item)

## Project Conventions
- Mobile-first responsive design with a "Magazine Editorial" aesthetic.
- Uses high-quality Unsplash imagery with grayscale-to-color transitions.
- Semantic HTML5 structure with interactive scroll animations (Intersection Observer).
- Tailwind 4 utility classes for layout; brand colors defined in `src/styles/global.css`.

## Technical Details
- **Content Management**: Menu items are managed via Astro Content Collections, grouped by categories (Signature Cakes, Morning Pastries, etc.).
- **Interactions**:
  - Smooth follow cursor previews on the menu page.
  - Entrance animations using `.visible` classes triggered by Intersection Observer.
  - Hover-driven grayscale transitions in galleries.
- **Design system**: Uses `font-serif` for drama (`Playfair Display`) and `font-sans` for readability (`Inter`).
